channel.title: Hands-On Tech (Video)
channel.itunes:author: TWiT
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons License - Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives 4.0 International - http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/
channel.itunes:subtitle: Hands-On Tech turns tech troubles into tech triumphs. Each episode zooms in on a specific theme with easy-to-follow advice.
channel.itunes:summary:
Welcome to Hands-On Tech, where host Mikah Sargent turns tech troubles into tech triumphs. Each episode zooms in on a specific theme, unpacking listener questions with expert analysis and easy-to-follow advice. From decoding the latest gadgets to simplifying everyday tech, Mikah's got you covered. Submit your tech queries through email at HOT@twit.tv or via TWiT's social media. You might hear your question answered on air! Whether you're puzzled by privacy settings or curious about cutting-edge innovations, Hands-On Tech is your weekly dose of tech insight and inspiration. Join Mikah every Sunday to hear the show that turns tech confusion into tech confidence! You can join Club TWiT for $10 per month and get ad-free audio and video feeds for all our shows plus everything else the club offers...or get just this podcast ad-free for $5 per month.
New episodes every Sunday.
channel.description:
Welcome to Hands-On Tech, where host Mikah Sargent turns tech troubles into tech triumphs. Each episode zooms in on a specific theme, unpacking listener questions with expert analysis and easy-to-follow advice. From decoding the latest gadgets to simplifying everyday tech, Mikah's got you covered. Submit your tech queries through email at HOT@twit.tv or via TWiT's social media. You might hear your question answered on air! Whether you're puzzled by privacy settings or curious about cutting-edge innovations, Hands-On Tech is your weekly dose of tech insight and inspiration. Join Mikah every Sunday to hear the show that turns tech confusion into tech confidence! You can join Club TWiT for $10 per month and get ad-free audio and video feeds for all our shows plus everything else the club offers...or get just this podcast ad-free for $5 per month.
New episodes every Sunday.
channel.itunes:keywords: TWiT, Technology, Tech, gadgets, product reviews

item.title: HOT 257: Transfer iPhone Photos & Videos to Windows PC - Moving iPhone Images & Videos to Windows
item.itunes:title: Transfer iPhone Photos & Videos to Windows PC - Moving iPhone Images & Videos to Windows
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Moving iPhone Images & Videos to Windows
item.itunes:keywords: TWiT, Mikah Sargent, Ask The Tech Guys, ATG, iPhone photo transfer, windows pc, HEIF, heic, HEVC, jpeg, MOV, microsoft photos app, icloud for windows, google photos, iMazing, file compatibility, photo metadata, live photos, USB photo backup
item.description:
On this week's episode of Hands-On Tech, Mikah helps Wayne understand why iPhone photos appear invisible or fail to copy when transferred to a Windows PC, and walks through the best methods to fix it.

Don't forget to send in your questions for Mikah to answer during the show! hot@twit.tv

Host: Mikah Sargent

Download or subscribe to Hands-On Tech at https://twit.tv/shows/hands-on-tech

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

Club TWiT members can discuss this episode and leave feedback in the Club TWiT Discord.

item.content:encoded:
On this week's episode of Hands-On Tech, Mikah helps Wayne understand why iPhone photos appear invisible or fail to copy when transferred to a Windows PC, and walks through the best methods to fix it.

Don't forget to send in your questions for Mikah to answer during the show! hot@twit.tv

media:content.media:description: Moving iPhone Images & Videos to Windows
media:content.media:keywords: TWiT, Mikah Sargent, Ask The Tech Guys, ATG, iPhone photo transfer, windows pc, HEIF, heic, HEVC, jpeg, MOV, microsoft photos app, icloud for windows, google photos, iMazing, file compatibility, photo metadata, live photos, USB photo backup

item.title: HOT 256: Android Auto & Google Assistant Driving Mode - Text Messages & Android Auto
item.itunes:title: Android Auto & Google Assistant Driving Mode - Text Messages & Android Auto
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Text Messages & Android Auto
item.itunes:keywords: TWiT, Mikah Sargent, Ask The Tech Guys, ATG, Android Auto, Google Assistant driving mode, hands-free text messages, Android device, Google Maps, infotainment system, text message reading, voice reply, AI-powered decisions, NetSuite by Oracle
item.description:
On this week's episode of Hands-On Tech, Mikah helps out Mike with how he can have Google read his text messages aloud while using Google Maps and how to allow hands-free replies while driving.

Don't forget to send in your questions for Mikah to answer during the show! hot@twit.tv

Host: Mikah Sargent

Download or subscribe to Hands-On Tech at https://twit.tv/shows/hands-on-tech

item.title: HOT 255: Bulk Recipe Imports - Converting Recipe Cards Digitally
item.itunes:title: Bulk Recipe Imports - Converting Recipe Cards Digitally
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Converting Recipe Cards Digitally
item.itunes:keywords: TWiT, Mikah Sargent, Ask The Tech Guys, ATG, bulk import recipes, Mela recipe manager, scan recipe cards, OCR, PDF conversion, Claude projects, openAI, Google's Gemini, JSON file format, automation, mac shortcuts, Python script, Hazel app
item.description:
On Hands-On Tech, Mikah guides Bob with some ways to streamline his process of scanning his physical recipe cards into importable files for his recipe manager app.

Don't forget to send in your questions for Mikah to answer during the show! hot@twit.tv

item.title: HOT 253: Backing Up a Large Photo Library - Effortlessly Back Up Your Large Photo Libraries

item.itunes:subtitle: Effortlessly Back Up Your Large Photo Libraries

item.description:

item.itunes:subtitle: Recovering Files From Obsolete NAS Devices

item.title: HOT 249: A Broken Apple Watch Streak - Can You Fix Broken Apple Watch Streaks?
item.itunes:title: A Broken Apple Watch Streak - Can You Fix Broken Apple Watch Streaks?
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Can You Fix Broken Apple Watch Streaks?
item.itunes:keywords: TWiT, Mikah Sargent, Ask The Tech Guys, ATG, Apple Watch streak, fix broken streak, Apple Watch activity rings, move ring, exercise ring, stand ring, restore Apple Watch streak, display bug, activity tracker, fitness app, close rings, Apple Support
item.description:
On this week's episode of Hands-On Tech, Mikah answers one of the more common problems that plagues Apple Watch users: how can you fix an Apple Watch streak that was broken?

Don't forget to send in your questions for Mikah to answer during the show! hot@twit.tv

media:content.media:title: HOT 249: A Broken Apple Watch Streak - Can You Fix Broken Apple Watch Streaks?
media:content.media:description: Can You Fix Broken Apple Watch Streaks?
media:content.media:keywords: TWiT, Mikah Sargent, Ask The Tech Guys, ATG, Apple Watch streak, fix broken streak, Apple Watch activity rings, move ring, exercise ring, stand ring, restore Apple Watch streak, display bug, activity tracker, fitness app, close rings, Apple Support

item.title: HOT 248: Home Theater PC Replacement - Alternatives to HTPC's
item.itunes:title: Home Theater PC Replacement - Alternatives to HTPC's
item.itunes:author: TWiT
item.itunes:subtitle: Alternatives to HTPC's
item.itunes:keywords: TWiT, Mikah Sargent, Ask The Tech Guys, ATG, HTPC replacement, Home Theater PC alternatives, nvidia shield tv pro, kodi, vlc, Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Max, Amazon Fire TV Cube, DVD ISO playback, digital media streaming, plex server, Jellyfin server
item.description:
On the first episode of Hands-On Tech for 2026, Mikah helps Andrew out with some recommendations to replace his home theater PC (HTPC) so that his family can watch old home movies easily!

Send in your questions for Mikah to answer during the show to hot@twit.tv.

Host: Mikah Sargent

Download or subscribe to Hands-On Tech at https://twit.tv/shows/hands-on-tech

Join Club TWiT for Ad-Free Podcasts!
Support what you love and get ad-free audio and video feeds, a members-only Discord, and exclusive content. Join today: https://twit.tv/clubtwit

Club TWiT members can discuss this episode and leave feedback in the Club TWiT Discord.

Sponsor:

  • NetSuite.com/hot

On the first episode of Hands-On Tech for 2026, Mikah helps Andrew out with some recommendations to replace his home theater PC (HTPC) so that his family can watch old home movies easily!
